# BoostMyBranding

> A dedicated social media management team for modern local businesses.

BoostMyBranding plans, writes, and publishes social media content for small and local businesses. We handle Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, TikTok, X, Pinterest, and Bluesky. Clients get 30 posts per month, a dedicated account manager, and a client portal for communication and content review.

## Services

- **Social Only** (EUR 700/month): 30 posts per month across 4 platforms, monthly performance report, dedicated account manager, client portal access.
- **Full Package** (EUR 800/month + EUR 800 setup): Everything in Social Only plus a custom mobile-first website with hosting and unlimited change requests.
- **Website Only** (EUR 150/month + EUR 800 setup): Custom website with hosting and monthly maintenance.

## How it works

1. Client signs up and shares business info, photos, and brand preferences.
2. Our team studies the business, builds a brand voice guide, and drafts the first month of content.
3. Content is reviewed internally, then shared with the client for preview via the portal.
4. Posts are scheduled and published automatically. Client can request changes anytime via chat.
5. Monthly report covers reach, engagement, and bookings.
